title: fix: jsxDEV is not a function in production (gate dev mode on NODE_ENV)
description: Deployed app throws TypeError: jsx_dev_runtime.jsxDEV is not a function. Cause: Bun.serve had development:{hmr,console} hardcoded, forcing the dev JSX runtime even under NODE_ENV=production where React's jsx-dev-runtime isn't bundled. Fix: enable development only when NODE_ENV !== production.
notes: Fixed. index.ts: development gated on NODE_ENV (dev object only when NODE_ENV!=production, else false). Production now uses stable react/jsx-runtime; served bundle has 0 jsxDEV refs. Service restarted; local 200; chunk asset serves 200. Root cause was hardcoded development:{hmr,console}.

title: chore: deploy chords at chords.dimsky.xyz (systemd + Caddy)
description: Run the Bun app as a systemd service on 127.0.0.1:3300 (data at data/chords.db) and reverse-proxy chords.dimsky.xyz -> localhost:3300 via Caddy. DNS already resolves to this VPS.
notes: Done & verified live. systemd chords.service (User=dimas, PORT=3300, BIND_HOST=127.0.0.1, CHORDS_DB_PATH=.../data/chords.db, bun index.ts, Restart=always, enabled). Caddy block chords.dimsky.xyz -> localhost:3300 (Caddyfile backed up to Caddyfile.bak-pre-chords). index.ts now binds 127.0.0.1 via BIND_HOST. Verified: service active, listening 127.0.0.1:3300, local 200; LE cert obtained; https://chords.dimsky.xyz/ -> 200, /api/library -> [], HTTP->HTTPS 308. Deploy steps in docs/deploy.md.

title: test: on-device verification of Phase 1 UI
description: Browser-verify on phone (per project rule: components verified via browser automation/manual). Run: bun run dev (or deploy to chords.dimsky.xyz). Check: (1) typing a chord shows variation cards; (2) each card's chord diagram renders correctly (dots, O/X, finger numbers, up-neck position label); (3) play button strums audible chord; (4) save adds to My Library and persists across reload; (5) delete removes it; (6) layout is comfortable on a narrow phone screen. File bugs as new issues.

title: feat: note resolver
description: SOT 8. Voicing -> concrete pitches for audio. AC: open D voicing resolves to expected pitch set. TDD.
notes: Done. src/chord/noteResolver.ts TDD. resolveMidi(frets) -> sounded MIDI pitches low->high (open D xx0232 -> [50,57,62,66]); midiToFreq (A4=440); resolveFrequencies for the audio layer. Reuses OPEN_MIDI exported from voicing.ts. No drift.

title: feat: difficulty comparator + topK
description: SOT 7. score=weights.features (barre+5, fretted+1, span+1, inner-mute+2, position+0.2). Expose compare(a,b); topK(chord,10) returns easiest-first. AC: compare(open,barre) ranks open easier; open D < F barre. Built as weights.features so weights swappable in P1.5. TDD.
notes: Done. src/chord/difficulty.ts TDD. score=weights.features with SOT §7 DEFAULT_WEIGHTS (barre5/fretted1/span1/innerMute2/position0.2); verified open D=4.6, F barre=13.6. compare(a,b) comparator; topK(chord,k) returns k easiest valid voicings easiest-first; easiest(chord) returns the single easiest. Weights are a parameter (default), so P1.5 learned weights drop in with zero rework. No drift.

title: feat: from-scratch voicing generator + validity
description: SOT 7. Build guitar voicings by fretboard search (E A D G B E; mute/open/fret; fretted notes within 5-fret span; up to ~fret 12). Keep only valid voicings: essential tones (triad 1-3-5; 7th/9th may drop 5th), root/slash-bass lowest, >=4 sounding strings, doubling allowed. AC: open D/open C appear; missing-3rd or <4-string shapes rejected. TDD.
notes: Done. src/chord/voicing.ts (+ shared src/chord/chordTones.ts) TDD. chordTones maps quality+extensions -> pitch-class set + essential tones + root/bass pc. voicing.ts: fretboard search (standard tuning, frets 0-12), keeps only valid shapes per SOT §7 (essential tones present, bass=lowest string, >=4 sounding, fretted within 5-fret span). Each Voicing carries notes[] + features{hasBarre,frettedCount,fretSpan,innerMutes,position} for the comparator. Verified open D (xx0232) and open C (x32010) are generated; features match SOT sanity (open D fretted=3/span=1/no-barre). hasBarre heuristic = frettedCount>4 (reproduces SOT's open-D≈4.6 vs F-barre≈13.6). chordTones added here (shared, also used by note-resolver) rather than a separate issue. No drift.

title: feat: variation generator (reharmonization)
description: SOT 7 default variation set. Given parsed chord, auto-generate curated variations (maj7/7/6/add9/maj9/sus2/sus4 + /3,/5 for major; m7/m9/m6/madd9/sus2/sus4 + /b3,/5 for minor; 9/13/7sus4 for dom7), plus base chord. AC: variations('Bm') includes Bm7,Bm9,Bmadd9 and slash forms; list stays tight. TDD.
notes: Done. src/chord/variations.ts (+ shared src/chord/notes.ts helper) with TDD. Generates SOT §7 default set: major (maj7/7/6/add9/maj9/sus2/sus4 + /3,/5), minor (m7/m9/m6/madd9/sus2/sus4 + /b3,/5), dom7 (9/13/7sus4); base + typed chord always included, deduped, tight. Added notes.ts (note<->semitone, transposeNote) as a shared dependency also needed by voicing/note-resolver — documented here rather than a separate issue. No SOT drift.

title: feat: chord symbol parser
description: SOT 3 (Layer 1). Parse text chord symbols (Bm, C/E, Dmaj7, F#m7b5) into {root, quality, extensions[], bass?}. AC: parser tests for those symbols pass; invalid input rejected clearly. TDD.
notes: Done. Pure module src/chord/parser.ts + parser.test.ts (14 tests, TDD red->green). Parses root(+#/b), triad quality (maj/min/dim/aug/sus2/sus4), extensions longest-first (maj7/add9/7/b5/...), and /bass; rejects invalid input. Matches SOT §3 Layer 1 + data model. No drift.

title: feat: Phase 1 — chord engine + library
description: Umbrella for Phase 1 per docs/phases/phase-1.md: type a chord -> reharmonized variations -> easiest playable shape (diagram) -> hear it -> save to library. Pure-logic modules are TDD; UI is browser-verified.

title: feat: add-chord flow UI
description: SOT 3 (Layer 2). Type chord -> variation pick-list each with diagram of easiest shape + play button -> save chosen to library -> library list with delete. Browser-verified.
notes: Done. src/ui/App.tsx + api.ts: type chord -> generateVariations -> easiest() voicing per variation -> card grid with ChordDiagram + play + save; My Library section with diagram + play + delete (GET/POST/DELETE). Error handling for unparseable input. Bundles & serves clean; on-device interaction check pending.

title: feat: Bun.serve app shell + Bootstrap
description: SOT 7. Bun.serve HTML import + React + Bootstrap CSS, phone-first shell. Browser-verified.
notes: Done. index.ts Bun.serve: '/' serves src/ui/index.html (Bootstrap CDN, viewport meta, phone-first), /api/library GET/POST/DELETE backed by sqlite at data/chords.db (CHORDS_DB_PATH; mkdir data/). POST validates via parseChord. Verified by curl: GET/POST/invalid-400/DELETE-204 + frontend bundles & serves 200. dev/start/test scripts added.

title: feat: chord library persistence (sqlite)
description: SOT 8. bun:sqlite store for LibraryEntry {id,symbol,parsedChord,chosenVoicing,createdAt}. CRUD. TDD the data layer.
notes: Done. src/library/store.ts TDD (in-memory sqlite). initLibrary/addEntry/listEntries/deleteEntry; LibraryEntry={id,symbol,voicing[],createdAt}; voicing stored as JSON, list newest-first by id DESC. Stores symbol+chosen voicing (parsedChord derivable from symbol). No drift.

title: feat: chord diagram SVG component
description: SOT 7. SVG fretboard diagram from voicing frets[6]/fingers[6]: string/fret grid, finger dots+numbers, O/X open/muted, position label. Browser-verified.
notes: Done. src/ui/ChordDiagram.tsx (SVG: string/fret grid, finger dots+numbers, O/X markers, position label for up-neck shapes) + pure src/chord/fingering.ts helper (TDD). Renders from voicing frets. Bundles clean. On-device visual check pending (see verification issue).

title: feat: Web Audio chord playback
description: SOT 7. Synthesized strum of a chord's notes via Web Audio. Tap to hear. Browser-verified.
notes: Done. src/ui/audio.ts Web Audio synthesized strum (one decaying triangle osc + lowpass per string, staggered for strum) via resolveFrequencies. Bundles clean. On-device audio check pending.
